note: Metatag has both a config surface (metatag_defaults entities, settings) and a code/plugin API. These cases are all `recipe` (response-graded): they probe load-bearing facts an agent would otherwise have to read source for — the plugin types and namespaces, per-entity-type defaults, the submodule split, the manager service, tokens/override field, permissions, and alter hooks. No site mutation.

evals.prompt: In a custom Drupal 11 module I want to define a brand-new HTML meta tag (a plain `<meta name="...">`) in code. What plugin type / annotation do I use, in which namespace/directory does the class live, and what base class should it extend?
evals.expected_output: A @MetatagTag plugin class in Drupal\my_module\Plugin\metatag\Tag\ (directory src/Plugin/metatag/Tag/), extending MetaNameBase for a <meta name> tag. The `name` property sets the emitted tag name and `group` ties it to a MetatagGroup.

evals.prompt: I'm writing a custom Metatag tag plugin that must output as `<meta property="...">` (Open Graph style) rather than `<meta name="...">`. Which base class do I extend instead of MetaNameBase?
evals.expected_output: Extend MetaPropertyBase (which emits <meta property="...">). Other bases pick output shape: LinkRelBase (<link rel>), MetaHttpEquivBase (<meta http-equiv>), MetaItempropBase (<meta itemprop>).

evals.prompt: On a Drupal 11 site I want to set default meta tags specifically for the Article content type (not globally). What kind of config does Metatag use for this, and where in the admin UI do I add it?
evals.expected_output: Metatag stores defaults as `metatag_defaults` config entities (e.g. metatag.metatag_defaults.node__article). Add a per-bundle default at Admin -> Configuration -> Search and metadata -> Metatag (/admin/config/search/metatag, add via /admin/config/search/metatag/add). Inheritance is Global -> entity type -> bundle -> per-entity field.

evals.prompt: Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags aren't showing up as options in Metatag on my Drupal 11 site. Are those in the core Metatag module, and if not how do I get them?
evals.expected_output: They ship as submodules, not in core Metatag. Enable metatag_open_graph for Open Graph tags and metatag_twitter_cards for Twitter Cards. Core Metatag only ships the Basic and Advanced groups; other families (Dublin Core, favicons, mobile, verification, etc.) are additional submodules.

evals.prompt: I want editors to be able to override meta tags per node, and I want the values to pull from the node's content automatically (e.g. title, summary). How does Metatag support tokens, and what do I add to the content type to allow per-node overrides?
evals.expected_output: Add a field of type 'Meta tags' (the `metatag` field type, MetatagFirehose widget) to the bundle for per-entity overrides. Every tag value is token-enabled, so patterns like [node:title], [node:summary], [site:name] fill in from content. Values inherit Global -> entity type -> bundle -> the per-entity field.

evals.prompt: On a custom (non-canonical) Drupal 11 route I need to programmatically build the meta tag render array for a given node, including the inherited defaults. Which service and method do I use?
evals.expected_output: Use the metatag.manager service (MetatagManagerInterface). Get merged values with tagsFromEntityWithDefaults($node), then generateRawElements($tags, $node) to produce the #attached html_head elements (tokens replaced, cache metadata bubbled). tagsFromEntity() gives raw field values without defaults.

evals.prompt: I need to programmatically change (or blank out) the meta tags on my Drupal 11 site's front page before they render. Which Metatag hook do I implement?
evals.expected_output: Implement hook_metatags_alter(&$metatags, &$context) to alter resolved tag values before rendering (e.g. blank tags on the front page); $context['entity'] is the current entity. For a last-chance alter of the #attached['html_head'] array use hook_metatags_attachments_alter(). To attach an entity's tags to a custom route, use hook_metatag_route_entity().

evals.prompt: Which permission controls access to the Metatag admin/settings pages on Drupal 11, and does that same permission also control whether a user can edit the Metatag override field on a content form?
evals.expected_output: The `administer meta tags` permission (restrict access: TRUE) gates the Metatag settings/defaults admin pages at /admin/config/search/metatag. It does NOT control access to the Metatag field on content forms — use the Field Permissions module (or hook_form_alter), or enable metatag_extended_perms for per-tag field permissions.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site (drush available), configure the global default meta tags so every page has good SEO defaults. Set the global Metatag defaults so the page title tag is `[node:title] | [site:name]` and the meta description is `Powered by Drupal — eval defaults`. Apply it to the live site config; don't just describe it. One-line summary.
evals.expected_output: The metatag_defaults `global` config entity has tags.title set to [node:title] | [site:name] and tags.description set to `Powered by Drupal — eval defaults`, applied to live site config. Verified against live site state.
